suspicion <= 66.question: Why have you been acting a little weird lately?

answers.answer: I'm just feeling a bit under the weather.
Leave me alone.
It's all in your head.
You are onto me, it seems.

answers.answer: Why, I'm just minding my own business.
Yes, because you've been up my ass for the last hour.
You're starting to catch up it seems.
Maybe, but I won't stay here for much longer so don't worry.

answers.answer: Eh well, it's probably just a misunderstanding.

answers.answer: I'll explain everything in just a moment, I'm a little busy.

answers.answer: Nothing, I'm just having a bad day!
